subject: fix(portfolio): use branded app names from READMEs for project cards
body:
Replace descriptive meta.json titles with actual branded app names
sourced from each repo's README: CanvaGrid, Graphiki, FuelHunt,
SyncTone, Sancio, Four Ems. Keeps descriptive titles for repos
without a distinct brand name.

Tags: ui, ux, portfolio

Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
